items.title: Dashboard: static shell, live data, simpler UI
items.body:
Goal: `dashboard open` only opens the HTML shell (no CLI-time snapshot generation). The page loads data from the DB when opened, respects project selection, and refreshes via client-side polling and/or browser refresh.

Current behavior (baseline): `dashboard emit`/`open` call RunEmit — read SQLite, build JSON snapshot (schema v1 or v2 with --all-projects), embed in `<script type="application/json" id="af-snapshot">`, write index.html. Meta http-equiv refresh reloads the whole page. `dashboard watch` re-runs emit on an interval. All data is baked into the file at emit time; browsers cannot read SQLite over file:// without a separate bridge (e.g. localhost HTTP API).

items.title: Document current dashboard pipeline
items.body: Capture how emit/open/watch interact (HandlersDashboard RunEmit, BuildHtml, embedded JSON, meta refresh, multi-project picker filtering client-side only on baked snapshot).

items.title: Architecture: bridge browser to SQLite
items.body: Decide how the page fetches DB state: e.g. read-only localhost HTTP server (new subcommand such as `dashboard serve`) exposing JSON aligned with current snapshot shape; document security (loopback-only, no remote bind). Alternatives (WASM + user-picked file, etc.) only if explicitly chosen after tradeoffs.

items.title: CLI UX: open vs generate vs serve
items.body: Specify commands: e.g. `dashboard open` opens static/cached index without RunEmit; optional one-time template install; `dashboard serve` (or equivalent) binds DB + static + API; keep or narrow `emit` for offline snapshot export if still needed.

items.title: Read-only HTTP API + static assets
items.body: Implement loopback server and route(s) returning snapshot JSON (project-scoped or multi-project v2 shape) reusing Store/query logic from emit path where possible; serve HTML/JS/CSS without embedding live data at write time.

items.title: Front-end: fetch on load, project picker, refresh
items.body: Replace sole reliance on embedded snapshot with fetch() to API; on load and on project change reload data; add JS timer auto-refresh and/or rely on user F5; remove or gate meta refresh when in served mode; clear loading/error states.

items.title: Simpler dashboard presentation
items.body: Reduce visual and interaction complexity (layout, columns, copy, detail panel) while keeping core board + item detail usable.

items.title: Tests and documentation
items.body: Extend or add tests for new HTTP surface and/or emit split; update README and AxonFlow skill for dashboard workflow (open vs serve vs watch vs emit).

items.title: Trace RunEmit → snapshot JSON → BuildHtml embedding and refresh story
Note file:// constraints vs fetch-to-localhost in plan notes
Write chosen approach: localhost API vs alternatives + threat model
Freeze JSON response shape (v2-compatible or simplified) and query params
Command matrix: open / serve / emit / watch behavior and flags
User-facing help text for new workflow
Implement loopback HTTP listener and static file serving
Snapshot route(s): default project, ?project=, --all-projects parity
Boot: fetch snapshot; render board from response (no embedded JSON)
Project select + debounced refetch; auto-refresh interval + manual refresh
IA/style pass: simpler header, board, detail
Automated tests for API and/or dashboard package
README + SKILL: dashboard open vs serve, ports, --db
